title: The World Reacts — Closing Beat
description: The Marines, pirates, and rulers face the aftermath of Doflamingo’s defeat.
scene: On pages 14–16, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens, Marines, Luffy, Trafalgar Law deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We don't care if we have to live in poverty... just make dressrose the country of peace it once was!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes, King Riku- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please, King Riku- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gahahaha! As a "king that fights," you're killin' me over here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Eliza- Bello!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: King Riku-Sama! Please, you must hurry back to the Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The Den Den Mushi have been ringing non-stop with calls from the kings of our neighboring countries!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WaHaha! It's cause I tipped 'em off ahead of time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "King Riku's back," I told 'em! They're all tickled pink!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The King of Procedure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: These past 10 years really have done a number on you, haven't they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I remember a king ready to stare down other countries, all of humanity, even, if it meant he didn't have to go to war!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Where'd that King go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Don't keep everyone waiting now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Bring him back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The King of Miracles, Riku bold!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It's just as he says,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: King Riku- Dono!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: This incident with Doflamingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I would never forgive myself if you felt like you bore even the slightest bit of responsibility for it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: exploiting the system of the "Ouka Shichibukai," that vile pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: made himself the king of a country, and in its lands,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Subjudated none other than the world government itself!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Citizens of Dressrossa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Members of the Royal Family,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: In place of the world government,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I ask most humbly for your for- Giveness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Whaaaa!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: It kills me... to know that we're the ones who put you through this...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: What...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: ''The false majesty of the power dress- Rosa appeared to possess belied its darker, true identity...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: the down- fall of the underworld broker, Doflamingo..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Uahh! ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: "And the prostrate apology of Marine HQ Admiral Flutora!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Get that to press!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: It really has...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Hit the fan over there in dress- Rosa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: The huge incident confined inside that cage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: The waves of this era swell ever larger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: will finally now be revealed to the rest of world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: The pirate alliance of those two has brought down Doflamingo!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
